rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Use implementation annexes only for assignments when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Use visible identifiers and case-provided thresholds in assumptions and guarantees
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations in assumptions and guarantees
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
Use implementation-level assignments to bind subcomponent outputs when needed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for assumptions and guarantees
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations and `const name : type = value;` for constants
Use `assign output = expression;` for assignments in implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Do not place assumptions and guarantees in implementation annexes unless they reference implementation-specific features
Do not use subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
